title: Xcrispy Xoily XWhole30 Quesadilla Onion
description: A light and crispy Portuguese dish featuring onion with a whole30-friendly twist, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: In a bowl, mix flour and salt. Add ground flaxseed.
Stir until well combined, creating a smooth paste.
Heat skillet over medium-high heat. Grease lightly with coconut oil.
Place half of the paste mixture in the skillet to form circles.
Add 1/2 teaspoon of sea salt to each circle of masa. Fill with sliced onions.
Cook until bottom is golden brown, then flip and cook other side until crispy and cooked through.
Serve hot as a whole30-friendly snack or breakfast accompaniment.
